dialogues.text: Alright. Here we go. [music from I Love You To Death plays] I Love You To Death is a tale of passion, betrayal, and enduring love based on a true story. Joey is an Italian immigrant with a huge appetite for life. Whether it's running his beloved pizza shop, doting on his kids, or stepping out on his wife with every beautiful woman he sees. Rosalie, Joey's long suffering wife has her world rocked when she learns of his infidelity. She turns to her mother, Mama Nadja, a crafty woman from the old country, her husband's young employee Divo who himself is in love with Rosalie and two drug addled losers Harlan and Marlon to make Joey pay. Together, they will poison and shoot Joey, then poison and shoot him again, as they struggle with their own incompetence and lack of conviction to seal the deal. Will Joey survive the night? And if he does, will he and Rosalie finally learn what it truly means when someone says, I Love You To death?
